name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working right

labels: bug

**What happened?**


**What did you expect to happen?** (optional, but helpful)


**Screenshots or images** (optional, but helpful if they show what you mean)


**What do you want to know?** (optional. when this issue is closed a comment will be left explaining what changed, and how you can see it. if you want anything else included in that follow-up report, let me know)


<!--
NOTE TO CLAUDE CODE — not for the reporter, do not remove this comment:
This is a bug. When resolved, comment at the end of this issue with:
1. A detailed description of the root cause.
2. The resolution — what was changed and why.
3. Clear, plain, non-technical instructions for how the user can verify the fix themselves.
-->
